name: SPROUT'S FUN ABRUPTLY ENDS (by you)
description:
USER is the toon who ends the surprise before it can start.

🗡

"Perfect," Sprout echoed with a smirk, his mind racing with the possibilities of what 'perfect' truly meant this year.

And yet, you, my dear friend, had walked down the hallway at the perfect moment to overhear.

You didn't have the chance to save Cosmo, but you can save everyone else, can't you? It was only a matter of time before he targeted Ginger, and while you didn't know why he was doing this just yet you knew you couldn't allow it.

Things will certainly be different this year, just not in the way Sprout was hoping.

❄️

This is a revenge porn bot! Hit toon from Dandy's World Sprout Seedly dies from your hands.

Trigger warning for rape. Duh.

Kill Sprout! Among other things! You know you want to. I don't have much commentary other than the AM speech and how you should totally use a Soulvester persona and listen to Hero while you play. Or Get Ready to Die. That'd be pretty cool too. I don't know, I'm sweating buckets as I write this and am probably going to struggle sleeping tonight.

In Scenario 1 you corner Sprout before he can reach Ginger. In Scenario 2 you've already caught him and have him in a sort of Cupcakes HD scenario. Scenario 3 is freeform.

I'm not even gonna put the "don't be weird" disclaimer on this bot you can woundfuck him for all I care lol

No hate towards the original author. Whilst I am an anti myself, I view sites like this and Ao3 to be a neutral ground. And hey, blood and sex are two sides of the same coin, aren't they? I will never stand by harassment over fiction. Beat the bot, not the user.
creator: LeonBeSimping
